prompt: A sparse, minimalist hospital waiting room with exactly ten identical chairs arranged in a single row against a long pale wall. Six chairs are bathed in soft warm amber light, appearing hopeful and calm. The remaining four chairs are engulfed in deep cold blue-grey shadow, heavier and darker than the rest, as if weighed down by grief. The floor is polished concrete. The ceiling light is dim and clinical. No people, no text, no signs, no numbers, no labels, no medical equipment visible. The mood is heavy, silent, and suffocating. The contrast between the warm and cold chairs communicates an invisible weight. Style: cinematic editorial photography, large-format film, shot with a 50mm lens. Lighting: warm amber on 6 chairs, cold blue-grey shadow on 4 chairs, dim overhead fluorescent. Color palette: muted warm amber, cold steel blue-grey, pale white walls, dark concrete floor. Composition: symmetrical, low angle, wide shot, chairs fill the frame. Do NOT include: bar charts, line graphs, pie charts, scatter plots, people, text, numbers, labels, legends, axes, infographic elements, arrows, icons, clipart, watermarks, multiple panels, windows, or any decorative objects. Aspect ratio: 16:9. Resolution: minimum 1024px on shortest side.
insight: Out of 569 women with suspicious breast scans, 212 had malignant tumors — nearly 1 in every 3 women was facing cancer.
